---
title: "one_to_split_to_two_layout"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/stwd/src/branch/main/R/stwd.R#L1714)

# `one_to_split_to_two_layout()`

make a 1 split 2 plot

## Usage

```r
one_to_split_to_two_layout(fig, first_level_sign = "+")
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `fig` | list of plots |
| `first_level_sign` | sign |

## Value

ggplot
